Home › About

About Us

Our Story

Why the Foundation Exists

GB United Foundation was created to close a real gap. Too many children have no access to organized sports, quality coaching, or the sense of belonging that comes from being on a team.

Soccer is the vehicle. Confidence, discipline, and opportunity for kids who've had too little of all three.

We work in underserved neighborhoods and public schools across California — coaching, gear, and community for families who need support.

See Our Programs
Vision, Mission & Focus

What We're Building

👁️

Vision

A community where no child is left out of sport because of where they live or what their family can afford.

🚀

Mission

To unite and uplift our community by providing equitable access to soccer, fostering confidence, teamwork, and personal development in every child we serve.

🎯

Focus

Underserved children and public schools — building skills alongside inclusion, confidence, and belonging.

What We Stand For

Core Values

01

Equity

Access should never depend on income. Every child gets the same shot.

02

Community

We build belonging — every child part of something bigger.

03

Excellence

High standards because our kids deserve nothing less.

04

Growth

Skills on the field. Confidence and character off it.

Building confidence, one goal at a time ⚽
